focus: cross-runtime config _NOTE_ parity + gemini-removal completeness + constitutional pruning correctness
noveltyJustification: First A8 traceability pass; all 3 P2 findings are new for this angle (no prior config/gemini findings). 2 actionable P2 (mirror drift, _NOTE_ parity gap) + 1 clean-verification record. weightedNew=2, weightedTotal=2, ratio capped at 1.0.

findingDetails.title: Dangling .gemini/agents/ pointers in Claude + Codex agent mirrors
findingDetails.evidence: Commit 8683890935 deleted .gemini/** and cleaned OpenCode canonical surfaces + deep-* runtime_capabilities.json, but did NOT edit .claude/agents/ or .codex/agents/ (git show 8683890935 --name-only | grep '^.(claude|codex)/agents/' = empty). orchestrate.md:21 is an active routing directive 'Gemini profile reads .gemini/agents/' pointing to the deleted dir; deep-review mirrors list '.gemini/agents/deep-review.md' as a runtime mirror; README.txt still says 'Mirrored to: .claude/agents/, .gemini/agents/, .codex/agents/'.
findingDetails.recommendation: Re-run the Claude/Codex agent mirror regen after the OpenCode canonical edit; drop the Gemini row/column to match runtime_capabilities.json (already clean).
findingDetails.findingClass: doc/config drift in READ-ONLY runtime mirrors
findingDetails.scopeProof: 7 enumerated file:line refs to deleted .gemini/agents/; commit name-only diff proves mirrors un-synced
findingDetails.affectedSurfaceHints: Claude+Codex agent mirror packaging/regen step; mirror sync post-deletion

findingDetails.title: _NOTE_ parity gap: _NOTE_HF_EMBED_SOCKET + _NOTE_TOTAL_MCP_BUDGET missing from codex/devin MCP configs
findingDetails.evidence: _NOTE_HF_EMBED_SOCKET present in opencode.json + .claude/mcp.json, count=0 in .codex/config.toml and .devin/config.json; _NOTE_TOTAL_MCP_BUDGET present only in opencode.json. The HF_EMBED_SOCKET note carries a load-bearing invariant ('Pinned identically for mk-spec-memory AND mk_skill_advisor ... single-owner ... Do not diverge'). All other ~15 _NOTE_* keys, the 37-tool claim, _NOTE_2_TOOLS enumeration, env, and command/args agree across all 4. All JSON valid; .mcp.json symlink->.claude/mcp.json intact.
findingDetails.recommendation: Fan the canonical _NOTE_HF_EMBED_SOCKET (and TOTAL_MCP_BUDGET if relevant) into .codex/config.toml (TOML form) and .devin/config.json, OR mark notApplicable if those profiles never co-host mk_skill_advisor.
findingDetails.findingClass: cross-runtime advisory _NOTE_ doc parity gap (no behavior impact)
findingDetails.scopeProof: per-file _NOTE_* key-set diff: opencode 17, claude 16, codex 15, devin 15; tool-count 37 uniform
